calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Jan-06-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Richard Viglienzoni in Propria Persona.

The Court granted the Petition to Establish Fact of Birth of Angelo Viglienzoni (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Dec-07-2016 Continued To Jan-04-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Vigilienzoni in Propria Persona.

The Court asked why a birth certificate is needed. Mr. Vigilienzoni reported that he wants to apply for duel citizenship with Italy and that he needs a birth certificate for his father to submit to the consulate. The Court stated that what has been provided does not give proof as to where he was born or as to the time and date. Mr. Vigilienzoni stated that the Baptism certificate shows the time and date and that his father was born at home on Vallejo Street. The Court stated that it needs direct proof. Mr. Vigilienzoni stated that his father was an orphan as his parents passed away in a flu epidemic and that little information is known. The Court stated that it does not have sufficient direct proof to make findings and an order, that it will need direct proof that he was born here and asked why he does not submit the information that he has to the consulate. Mr. Viglienzoni explained that his sister has already tried that. The Petition to Establish Fact of Birth was continued to January 4, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for petitioner to provide additional information.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
